title: Weather and British obsession
description: Four seasons in one day, the barbecue that got rained on and that smug feeling when you predicted the weather correctly — weather chat is the ultimate icebreaker! See how you match up!

questions.text: Name something people say when it starts raining unexpectedly.

answers.text: I knew I should have brought an umbrella
typical — always rains on weekends
just when I had plans outside
at least the garden needed it
good job I checked the forecast

questions.text: Name something people do on the first sunny day of the year.

answers.text: immediately go outside and sit in it
fire up the barbecue
declare it summer and wear shorts
book a holiday
open every window in the house

questions.text: Name something people complain about during a heatwave.

answers.text: can't sleep because it's too hot
the commute is unbearable
there's no air conditioning anywhere
too hot to eat anything
my flat turns into an oven

questions.text: Name something people say when it snows.

answers.text: everything will grind to a halt
the kids will love this
I'm not going in to work today
it's so pretty until it turns grey
let's make a snowman

questions.text: Name something people check before leaving the house.

answers.text: the weather forecast on their phone
whether to bring an umbrella
what coat to wear
if it looks like rain outside
the temperature so they dress right

questions.text: Name something that gets ruined by bad weather.

answers.text: a garden party or barbecue
a music festival or outdoor event
a wedding with outdoor photos
a day at the beach
a camping trip

questions.text: Name something people say when the weather forecast is wrong.

answers.text: why do I ever trust the forecast
they're always getting it wrong
I looked out the window — that's my forecast now
it said sunny and now it's pouring
I want a refund on my umbrella

questions.text: Name something people love about autumn.

answers.text: the colourful leaves on the trees
cosy jumpers and warm drinks
the crisp fresh air
Halloween and fireworks season
comfort food like stews and soups

questions.text: Name a way people talk about the weather to start a conversation.

answers.text: can you believe this weather?
looks like it might rain later
lovely day isn't it?
freezing today — properly cold
typical British weather this

questions.text: Name something people do when they're stuck indoors because of the weather.

answers.text: binge-watch a series
bake something
tidy or clean the house
finally do something they've been putting off
read a book with a hot drink
